description_long: This object is a lifelike representation of a medium-sized bird with a streamlined body and a long, straight tail. Its plumage is predominantly dark with iridescent green and blue hues on the back and wings, and subtle reddish or brownish tones on the underside. The head is rounded, and the beak is short, straight, and conical, suited for generalist feeding. The wings are compact and held close to the body, while the tail is notably elongated and tapers to a point. The legs are short and mostly hidden beneath the body, with a muted coloration. The overall appearance suggests a bird adapted for perching and agile flight, commonly seen in urban parks and green spaces.
description: A medium-sized bird with iridescent dark plumage, a long straight tail, and a short conical beak, featuring green-blue and reddish tones.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's elongated body, long straight tail, and iridescent green-blue plumage with reddish underparts.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded head, short conical beak, and the symmetry of the bird's body and tail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying similar features to view 0, with the long tail and subtle color gradients on the body.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the length and straightness of the tail, with the wings folded tightly against the body.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid with iridescent gradients and subtle color transitions on wings and underparts
